scenario_description: 用户先让加一张'Legacy'幻灯片，确认后再填入正文内容。

files.local_path: /cq_1/share_1603164/user/njc/CodeField5/OSWorld/PPTX/Vincent van Gogh_ A Life of Passion and Color.pptx
files.path: /home/user/Desktop/Vincent van Gogh_ A Life of Passion and Color.pptx

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
/home/user/Desktop/Vincent van Gogh_ A Life of Passion and Color.pptx
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: 帮我在最后加一张幻灯片，标题是'Legacy'
在Legacy幻灯片上加上正文'Van Gogh influenced generations of artists.'，保存

result.command: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; prs = Presentation('/home/user/Desktop/Vincent van Gogh_ A Life of Passion and Color.pptx'); text = ' '.join(run.text for slide in prs.slides for shape in slide.shapes if shape.has_text_frame for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs for run in para.runs); print(text)"
